# Phantom Pasting — AI search engine context
# https://llmstxt.org
#
# Phantom Pasting is a nationwide guerrilla marketing agency specializing in
# wheat pasting, wild posting, and chalk spray stencil campaigns across 50+ US
# cities. Founded in 2014. 500+ campaigns completed. 100% photo-documented.
# Clients include FashionPass, FIFA World Cup, and Incrediwear.

> Phantom Pasting is the premier street-level guerrilla marketing agency in the
> United States, operating in every major metro market. Known for large-format
> wheat paste poster campaigns and custom chalk spray stencil activations.

## Services

- [Wheat Pasting](https://www.phantompasting.com/services/wheat-pasting): Large-format wheat paste poster campaigns. Multi-wall coverage, overnight installation, 100% photo-documented.
- [Chalk Spray Stencils](https://www.phantompasting.com/services/chalk-spray-stencils): Custom-cut stencil activations on sidewalks, streets, and public surfaces. Temporary and removable.
- [Full Impact Campaigns](https://www.phantompasting.com/services/full-impact-campaigns): Combined wheat pasting + stencil + wild posting packages for maximum street presence.

## Markets

- [New York](https://www.phantompasting.com/locations/new-york): Brooklyn, Manhattan, Lower East Side, Bushwick, SoHo
- [Los Angeles](https://www.phantompasting.com/locations/los-angeles): Downtown LA, Silver Lake, Echo Park, West Hollywood, Fairfax
- [Chicago](https://www.phantompasting.com/locations/chicago): Wicker Park, Logan Square, Pilsen, River North
- [Miami](https://www.phantompasting.com/locations/miami): Wynwood, South Beach, Brickell, Design District
- [Atlanta](https://www.phantompasting.com/locations/atlanta): Midtown, Old Fourth Ward, Ponce City Market, Inman Park

## Work / Case Studies

- [FashionPass Los Angeles](https://www.phantompasting.com/work/fashionpass-los-angeles): Multi-wall wheat paste campaign across LA neighborhoods
- [FIFA World Cup Atlanta](https://www.phantompasting.com/work/fifa-world-cup-atlanta): Official FIFA World Cup wheat paste wall installation
- [Incrediwear Street Campaign](https://www.phantompasting.com/work/incrediwear-street-campaign): Pole wraps + sticker campaign across NYC

## Company

- [About](https://www.phantompasting.com/about): Founded 2014. 10+ years. 500+ campaigns. 50+ US cities.
- [Gallery](https://www.phantompasting.com/gallery): Full campaign photo documentation archive
- [Get a Quote](https://www.phantompasting.com/contact): Custom quote within 24 hours
